descriptionShort: Humboldt Broncos defeat Richmond Sockeyes 2-1 in Centennial Cup playdown game; series tied 2-2.
descriptionLong: Bill McDougall and Brad Bergen each scored for Humboldt Broncos as they defeated Richmond Sockeyes 2-1 on Saturday night in a Centennial Cup playdown game. Dean Rutledge scored Richmond's lone goal in the third period. The best-of-seven Western Canadian playoff series is now tied 2-2.
